documentation:
repeat call x-times: docker API is just awesome

```
function

param args

tuple, args for function

dict, kwargs for function

param retries

int, how many times we try?

response of the call
```

modules.name: sen.tui.ui
documentation:
This is a framework for terminal interfaces built on top of urwid.Frame.

It must NOT contain any application specific code.
